name: Corn Bread with Fontina Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Grease a 9 X 13 baking pan.
2. Cube the fontina cheese.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, and oil until combined.
5. Add the cubed fontina cheese to the dry ingredients and stir until just incorporated.
6. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until a moist batter forms. The batter may still be lumpy.
7. Spoon the batter evenly into the prepared baking pan.
8. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
9. Cut the bread into squares to serve.
Notes: Per square serving: 126 calories, 4g fat
